sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54313" key="kata/ktupos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατάκτῠπ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n54313.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κατάδουπος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
